titleStmt.title: Unho-zan Tei Dosh(o) daiji — Mount Yunfeng inscribed characters (rubbing)
雲峰山鄭道昭題字（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription: Unho-zan Tei Dosh(o) daiji — Mount Yunfeng inscribed characters. Holding institution: Daito Bunka University, Institute of Calligraphy 大東文化大学書道研究所 (libdaito). Rubbing (拓本), folding book (折本), 87 leaves, ca. 35x38cm. Image verified HTTP 200. From the 雲峰山 (Unho-zan) cliff group.

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Northern Wei (北魏); creator 鄭道昭（?-516）

bibl.ref: Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator via the Epiwen Japanese-repository workflow. Image served live.

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
